arts.ttl: Juventus make bold move in transfer market: Contact established for Jonathan David
arts.sum: Juventus have taken concrete steps towards securing Jonathan David, the talented Canadian striker currently playing for Lille. Recent reports from Calciomercato indicate that the Old Lady’s transfer team has made contact with David’s agents, seeking detailed information about potential salary demands, agent fees, and contract duration. The discussions were comprehensive, with David expressing his interest in Serie A and the prospect of joining the Bianconeri. David has officially informed Lille that he will not be renewing his contract, which expires in July. arts.ttl: Juve vs Lazio, the first big match of Matchday 8
arts.sum: Lazio have won two of their last three league matches against Juventus (L1), as many wins as in their previous 36 meetings against the Bianconeri in Serie A (D8 L26). Courtesy of their 2-1 comeback win against Empoli in their most recent match, Lazio are the team that have gained the most points from losing positions in this Serie A campaign (seven).
